aboutTitle: About Birla Arika – Sector 31, NH-8, Gurgaon
aboutDescription: Birla Arika is a LifeDesigned® ultra-luxury residential project by Birla Estates, located in Sector 31 off NH-48, Gurgaon. Spread across 13.275 acres with 75% open spaces, the project features 7 high-rise towers of G+40 floors, comprising approximately 500 premium 4 BHK+Staff apartments (4200–4900 sq. ft.) with only 2 units per floor for ultimate privacy. The project boasts 4 exclusive clubhouses — The Fitness Club (gym, yoga, pilates, spa, salon, swimming pools), The Sports Club (tennis, squash, badminton, basketball), The Social & Entertainment Club (private theatre, karaoke, restaurant, business centre), and The Kids' Club (indoor play, trampoline, library, hobby rooms) — all connected by The Walk, a dedicated pathway. Interiors feature Italian marble flooring, wooden bedroom floors, modular kitchens with built-in appliances, smart home automation, Vastu-compliant design, and master baths with steamers. Birla Arika holds an IGBC Gold rating and is 5 km from Cyber City, with direct access to NH-48, DLF Phase 2, Ambience Mall, Medanta, and IGI Airport.
